device_name: Vantage Galan 3T, MRT-3020, V10.0 with AiCE Reconstruction Processing Unit for MR
intended_use: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the
intended_use_full: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the head or body. Additionally, this system is capable of non-contrast enhanced imaging, such as MRA.
ground_truth: Conventional method (matrix expansion with Fine Reconstruction and processing with typical clinical filter) used as reference standard for image comparison
other_metrics: Edge Slope Width (image sharpness evaluation), Ringing Variable Mean (ringing artifact evaluation), Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR), Contrast Change Ratio; Clinical image review using modified 5-point Likert scale across categories including ringing, sharpness, SNR, overall IQ, and feature conspicuity; Gwet's Agreement Coefficient reported 'strong agreement at good and very good level'; all reconstructions scored 'on average at, or above, clinically acceptable'

recalls.reason: Affected system contains components that do not meet the required distance between electrodes for compliance with the IEC 60601-1 standard for medical electrical equipment.
recalls.product_description: VANTAGE GALAN 3T. CMSC Model: MRT-3020/U7. Model Number: MEXL-3020/B7.
